message:
test(frankenterm-core): add SGR color + CJK wide char conformance fixtures

Add 16 new VT conformance fixtures:
- 10 SGR color fixtures: named fg/bg, bright fg/bg, indexed fg/bg, RGB fg/bg,
  combined fg+bg+attrs, color persistence, full reset clears colors
- 2 CJK wide character fixtures: basic rendering, wrap at margin
- 3 erase fixtures: ED 2 clears content, EL 0 preserves other lines
- 1 cursor fixture: CUP with active SGR color

These exercise the new color validation support in the conformance harness
(ColorExpectation with default/named/indexed/rgb variants).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,43 @@
+{
+  "name": "ed_all_clears_content",
+  "description": "ED 2 (CSI 2 J) erases entire display, cursor stays at current position",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "48656c6c6f1b5b324a",
+  "comment": "After CSI 2 J, all cells should be blank spaces. Cursor position is preserved.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 5
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": " "
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": " "
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": " "
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 3,
+        "char": " "
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 4,
+        "char": " "
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
+{
+  "name": "cjk_basic",
+  "description": "CJK wide characters occupy 2 columns each",
+  "initial_size": [
+    10,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "41e4b896e7958c42",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 0,
+      "col": 6
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "\u4e16"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 3,
+        "char": "\u754c"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 5,
+        "char": "B"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,47 @@
+{
+  "name": "cjk_wrap_at_margin",
+  "description": "Wide char at right margin wraps to next line when autowrap is on",
+  "initial_size": [
+    6,
+    3
+  ],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "4142434445e4b896",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": {
+      "row": 1,
+      "col": 2
+    },
+    "cells": [
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "A"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 1,
+        "char": "B"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 2,
+        "char": "C"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 3,
+        "char": "D"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 0,
+        "col": 4,
+        "char": "E"
+      },
+      {
+        "row": 1,
+        "col": 0,
+        "char": "\u4e16"
+      }
+    ]
+  }
+}
